title: Wax Wand
description: A datapack to craft a wand for waxing/unwaxing copper. (Single 1x1 / Area 5x5x5)
body:
Wax/unwax **all copper blocks** in **1.21.6 - 1.21.11**.

## Features
- **Copper** **blocks**, **cut**, **slabs**, **stairs**, **grate**, **bulb**, **trapdoors**
- Keeps states (waterlogged, half, etc.)
- **6-block** reach + particles & sounds
- **Single & AoE** - (1x1) & (5x5x5)
- Advancements, because why not 🏆
- **Particle Outlines** to see the effected area.

## Crafting
Wax Wand **(1x1)**

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd75aa50887cf7dd5d4e2f25cc4a591ad41d5306.png)

**AoE** - Wax Wand **(5x5x5)**

![crafting aoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WLScjdnc/images/aa263e310b37879edc7226ca93a12ff1cf0ca799.png)


## Use
1. Hold the **Wax Wand**.  
2. **Sneak + Right-Click** the copper block you’re looking at (up to 6 blocks range).  
3. Toggles **waxed ↔ unwaxed**. Same for the AoE Wand.


**Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/rXnr7XHRg8) server for bug reports or feature suggestions. Im just starting :)**
